name: @agent-collab/hub
description: Agent Communication Hub - Real-time messaging and knowledge sharing for multi-agent systems

scripts.build: ncc build src/skill-cli.ts -o scripts --minify --no-source-map-register && find scripts -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' | xargs rm -f 2>/dev/null; find scripts -type d -empty -delete 2>/dev/null; true
